_comment: Recommended palette for portraits that need a broader tonal range than the default 4-colour Canal palette. The default palette only covers pink/green/light-green/dark-brown — fine for abstract hearts, but NOT enough for a face or character like 2B from NieR. This template suggests the colour ROLES you need; the user must find the actual decoration in-game, place one, export the hideout, run `hideout-art inspect path/to/export.hideout` to read the hash, and add it to KNOWN_HASHES in src/hideout_art/constants.py. Until the TODOs are filled in, image_to_hideout() will refuse to load this palette (Palette.__post_init__ raises on unknown decoration names).
_how_to_fill: 1. In the game, place ONE of each missing decoration in your hideout.
4. The 'Unknown hashes' section lists the hash for each unknown name.
5. Add the entry to KNOWN_HASHES in src/hideout_art/constants.py.
6. Add the decoration name to ART_TYPES in the same file (if it's purely artistic).
7. Replace the TODO entries below with the actual decoration name.

_colour_roles_needed_for_2b.white: 2B's dress, skin highlights, skirt trim. Look for snow, marble, bone, white flowers, pale sand.
_colour_roles_needed_for_2b.black: 2B's blindfold, hair, glove, boots. Look for charred wood, obsidian, ash, black sand, dark stone.
_colour_roles_needed_for_2b.gray: Shadows on dress, sword blade, metal details. Look for stone rubble, gravel, ash pile, slate.
_colour_roles_needed_for_2b.silver: Sword blade highlights, metallic accents. Look for crystal, ice, polished stone.
_colour_roles_needed_for_2b.skin: 2B's skin (visible near eyes/neck). Look for pale tan sand, pale pink sand (already have Falling Sand), peach flower.
_colour_roles_needed_for_2b.pink: Glow accents, lips. Already covered by Falling Sand.
_colour_roles_needed_for_2b.red: Emblem on dress. Look for red flower, blood moss, ruby crystal, red candle.
